data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding timezone overlap.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to confirm that the system finds overlap in meeting times across different timezones. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate that the displayed times are adjusted according to each participant's timezone preferences. While the linked use case mentions that the system stores each participant's timezone, there is no direct evidence showing that the displayed times reflect this accurately, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming that all displayed times are shown in the respective timezones of all participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate timezone display for participants
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that times are displayed in the timezone of each participant.
